title: MONITORING AND ANALYSIS OF GEODETIC VISUAL DEFORMATION.
author: Mamajonova Nodira, Mirzayev Baxtiyar
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This article presents the rules of procedure for using the visual monitoring method used when conducting technical inspection of buildings and structures.
steps_raw: This article presents the rules of procedure for using the visual monitoring method used when conducting technical inspection of buildings and structures.
